ELPAC Level 2
NWEA 1000–1300L
DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS11-L2-10001300-HSELA1112-STP-MNA-01 • HS English 11-12 • Objective Summary of a Literary Text

What the Poem Says

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a student. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the student pitching to the teacher?
2QUESTION 2: According to the student, what makes this edition different from existing translations?
3QUESTION 3: What does the teacher's last response suggest the student still needs to do to complete the pitch?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. What purpose does the student have in explaining what her edition adds? What purpose does the teacher have in asking her what the poem says?
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5, PI.B.6  |  CCSS.ELA-LITERACY.RL.11-12.2  |  HS English 11-12: Objective Summary of a Literary Text
